response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and a single vocal musical performance, "SUPER DUPER" by ReGLOSS, was identified. I searched for "SUPER DUPER ReGLOSS Japanese and English lyrics" to obtain the lyrics. The video structure was then mapped into three scenes based on the song, the talk/MC segment, and the merchandise showcase.
response.global_summary: The video features a musical performance of "SUPER DUPER" by the virtual idol group ReGLOSS, followed by a talk segment (MC) celebrating Ichijo Ririka's birthday, and finally a showcase of birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: The virtual idol group ReGLOSS performs their song "SUPER DUPER" on a 3D stage. The song title appears in the top-left corner.

Dazzling curiosity is everything in the world 
To a place even the gods don't know 
Where the pure passion

And unthinkable bad news 

Even joys and sorrows

Being one in body and soul

And the replica I reluctantly let go
